name: poly_bevel_G2_apex_v3
description: Polygon Bevel (mesh.bevel, edit-mode Polygons) GROUP shared-corner accumulator, fully-enclosed-apex branch (internalCnt>=2 && !anyBoundary) -- task 0458 Phase 1. Valence-3 apex surrounded by 3 irregular NON-planar, non-orthogonal quads (all selected) so the apex has 3 internal edges and no boundary edge -- the fully-enclosed branch, isolated on asymmetric geometry (the naive Sigma(unit normal) accumulator and the reference's AVE_N=k*N/|N|^2 coincide ONLY on the orthogonal cube-corner case every prior grouped-poly-bevel fixture happened to sit on). group=true, inset=0.1, shift=0.1. Reference topology: 7v/3f -> 13v/9f. This fixture pins the APEX vertex's position bit-exact (orig + shift*AVE_N, no inset term -- there is no boundary edge to inset against) via a lerp_checks single-point existence assertion, and the overall vertex/face counts. It intentionally does NOT assert the dump's other (ring) vertex positions bit-exact: those ring vertices are each shared between 2 of the 3 faces (the SAME half-shared law poly_bevel_G1_halfshared_tent.json pins exactly), but here the OTHER end of that shared edge is this fully-enclosed apex rather than another half-shared vertex -- a residual up to ~0.011 remains there whose exact closed form was not pinned to float precision even with rr/gdb read access to the reference (toolcards/poly.bevel/findings.md SS1) -- a documented, known gap, not silently papered over with a loosened tolerance.
source: Frozen reference-editor capture via the private capture harness's polygon-bevel op (task 0458 Phase 0 dump-oracle poly_bevel_G2_apex_v3). Apex position predicted-vs-measured to 2.6e-8 (float32 floor) using the recovered AVE_N law.

provenance.harness: private capture harness (reference-editor polygon-bevel tool, headless scripted op-dump)
provenance.notes: Phase-0 dump-oracle for the group shift accumulator's fully-enclosed-apex branch. Pins the apex vertex bit-exact and the topology (vertex/face counts); the SAME dump's half-shared ring vertices carry a known, documented residual (see bevelFacesByMask's doc comment in source/mesh.d) not asserted here.
